summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Interference and Diffraction is a key topic in Geometric and Physical Optics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of interference and diffraction.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding interference and diffraction has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
